title: [Bard Guild, Conch Pub]
description: The Conch Pub is a cozy chamber, with dark teak-paneled walls hung with oil and watercolor paintings.  A few tables sit in alcoves provided by standing screens crafted of teak and caned panels.  A long bar faces a wall of windows standing open to admit the Bay breeze.

wayto.25681: ;e table = "large"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
wayto.25682: ;e table = "small"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
